DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES IS DENIED. THE SEPARATE STATEMENT SUBMITTED PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA RULE OF COURT 335 DOES NOT SET FORTH THE COMPLETE TEXT OF THE RESPONSE BY DEFENDANT TO INTERROGATORY 15.1. SIMILARLY, EXHIBITS B AND E OF PLAINTIFF'S MOTION OMIT THE RELEVANT PAGES OF THE RESPONSE TO THE INTERROGATORY THAT IS THE BASIS FOR THE MOTION. (610/BCHAN)
